title: Activism and community voice
caption: I care about civic courage, accountability, and the power of ordinary people to speak clearly about the future they want.

title: Agriculture technology
caption: Agritech matters to me because it connects food, livelihoods, data, and practical tools that can improve everyday farming decisions.

title: Building useful things
caption: Beyond code, I am interested in projects that solve real problems: simple systems, better access, and technology that feels close to people.
